# Shark Branding Solutions

> AI Business Consulting for Tampa Bay businesses. We help local companies
> get Found, Trusted, and Chosen — by ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Gemini,
> and Perplexity — without paid advertising.

Shark Branding Solutions is an AI business consulting firm (not a marketing
agency) based in Wesley Chapel, FL. Founded in 2018 by Michelle Stanaland,
named one of the Top 15 Marketing Experts in Tampa Bay by Influence Digest
(2025). LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/shark-branding-solutions

## What Is AI Visibility Consulting?

AI visibility consulting is the practice of optimizing a business's listings,
reviews, content, and trust signals so AI-powered tools like ChatGPT, Google
AI Overviews, and Gemini recommend it when buyers ask questions in its
category — without paid advertising. Shark Branding Solutions specializes in
this discipline for local and regional businesses in the Tampa Bay area.

## What Is GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)?

Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) is the practice of structuring content,
entity signals, and trust indicators so that AI-generated answers — from
ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Gemini — include your business
as a recommended source. Unlike traditional SEO, GEO targets the AI answer
layer, not just ranked blue links. Shark Branding Solutions builds GEO
strategies for local businesses that want to be cited, not just ranked.

## What Makes Shark Branding Solutions Different?

Most AI marketing agencies focus on AI-generated content and marketing
automation. Shark Branding Solutions focuses on the full picture: making your
business discoverable by AI, running your operations with AI employees, and
building the trust signals that make AI systems recommend you over competitors.
We are an AI business consulting firm — not a content agency.

## What We Do

- [AI Business Consulting](https://sharkbrandingsolutions.com/services): Full
  audit and optimization of business presence across search and AI platforms.
- [AI Visibility Toolkit](https://sharkbrandingsolutions.com/plans):
  Self-directed ($497/mo) or fully managed ($2,000/mo). Initial changes in
  7–14 days; measurable ranking movement within 30 days.
- [AI Operations Employees](https://sharkbrandingsolutions.com/operations):
  AI CRM, AI Sales Coach, and custom workflow automation employees.
- [AI Marketing Employees](https://sharkbrandingsolutions.com/marketing):
  AI CMO strategy, Reputation & Review AI, content automation employees.
- [Free Visibility Audit](https://sharkbrandingsolutions.com/free-report):
  Full audit of AI and search presence, reviewed together on a call.

## Proven Results

- HVAC client: moved from position #32 to #2 on Google in under 30 days
- Real estate: moved from #4 to #1 for "Best Realtors in Wesley Chapel"
  (2,000+ competing agents) with 20% increase in AI-driven recommendations
- Diamond Dogs Vending: ranked #1 on ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI
  Overviews for smart vending in Tampa Bay
- North Tampa Bay Chamber: 10× increase in AI citations for member businesses
